reference: I have stage three brain cancer and I just finished my chemotherapy for five days this month. My concern is that my stool has mucus and light red blood, and it is very foul. I haven’t passed a normal bowel movement in about two days, which is typical when I am on my chemotherapy. I was wondering if I should go to the emergency room?
text: I have stage 3 brain cancer, and I just finished my chemotherapy for 5 days this month. My concern is that my stool has mucus and light red blood, and it is very foul. I haven't passed a normal bowel movement in about 2 days, which is typical when I am on my chemo. I was wondering if I should go to the emergency room.
